case_title: EDUARDO CHE MUTUL VS. MING ZE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA PARC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUTUL, EDUARDO CHE AS TO DEFENDANT MING ZE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA PARC HONG KNOG RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUTUL, EDUARDO CHE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MING ZE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA PARC HONG KNOG RESTAURANT $5,199.87 PRINCIPAL, $59.98 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,439.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT (CCP 673 AND 681.020; CC 954.5); CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU, ASSIGNEE.
